title: Add structured Captain error codes
goal: Replace Captain string-only blocked_reasons and failed_reasons with structured error records while preserving deterministic compatibility summaries.

acceptance.assertion: Captain errors include code, message, phase, severity and optional context.
Existing string reason fields remain available or are deterministically derived during a compatibility period.
Gate, preflight, execution and post-verification errors use one error-code source of truth.
Tests cover deterministic ordering, JSON stability and backward-compatible summaries.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #106 improved error propagation but still uses string lists as the primary contract.
